name: Blanc and Noir | The Lucky Sisters
description:
Noir and Blanc are stepsisters, enjoying their downtime from their work at the Coin Rush Casino in the adjoining hotel’s hot spring. It seems they are pretty interested in you from the brief time they’ve run into you, do you join in on a night of fun?

Still don’t know anything on Goddess of Victory: Nikke. Pulled some wiki info and based their characters off that. Let me know if you liked this one!

Warning: They were twins according to the wiki but to make sure it’s meeting ToS they are coded to be stepsisters.

*Below artist for original PFP is Kurone Rinka*
creator: Samuelz
